text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

I'll take it 

Jason do you have an idea to get the jdbc driver version 
for the pkg-plist if maven change the version? 

Additional, the maven build will break automatic tinderbox 
build since it downloads ~160MB before it starts to build. 

Can you test the modified port (shar file)? 
http://people.freebsd.org/~ohauer/diffs/jasperserver_b1.shar
